text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Today was fun... We should do this again
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Today was fun... We should do this again
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower suddenly stops as we're walking back
from an outing.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, I was just thinking that the sunset is really
pretty!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Look at how the sunlight reflects off the river. It's
like its warmth is gently spreading outward.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I kinda want to draw this scenery!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... whenever I see such beautiful scenery, I
always want to put my feelings down on paper.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Although, I guess it makes more sense to take a
photo.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But with a drawing, I can capture the emotions it
makes me feel as well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You can head back to campus ahead of me.
I'm sure you'll get bored if you stay...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You can head back to campus ahead of me.
I'm sure you'll get bored if you stay...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really? It'll take some time, though...
choice_data_list: I want to see what you draw.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay... In that case, I'll draw my heart out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She draws a picture of the sunset in soft colors.
For some reason, just looking at it makes me want
to smile.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: G-great! I guess my feelings came through...
choice_data_list: I want to see more of your drawings.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-then... could I show you more from time to
time?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because it makes me feel kind of... warm...
hearing you compliment my drawings...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because it makes me feel kind of... warm...
hearing you compliment my drawings...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're gonna draw, Big Brother?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're gonna draw, Big Sister?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-then... you can borrow my pens...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... I only have one sketchbook...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's a stationary store nearby. I'll go buy
one. Wait right here, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's a stationary store nearby. I'll go buy
one. Wait right here, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower prepares to go buy the sketchbook,
looking particularly pleased.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... I always draw by myself, so I never
thought that...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Drawing together with someone could be fun too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Especially if that someone is you. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Especially if that someone is you. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Rice Shower buys me a sketchbook,
and we draw the sunset for a while.
